# Sail Halong

> Independent English-language guides to choosing Halong Bay, Lan Ha Bay and Bai Tu Long Bay cruise formats, seasons and trip lengths. Sail Halong does not publish copied prices or make claims about specific products.

## Start here

- [Halong Bay cruise guide](https://www.sailhalong.com/halong-bay-cruises/): Choose by bay, duration and travel style.
- [Best Halong Bay cruises](https://www.sailhalong.com/best-halong-bay-cruises/): The criteria used to judge options without ranking named products.
- [Day trips from Hanoi](https://www.sailhalong.com/halong-bay-day-trips-from-hanoi/): Decide whether one day provides enough useful time on the bay.
- [Overnight cruises](https://www.sailhalong.com/halong-bay-overnight-cruises/): Compare daytime-only travel with one or more nights.
- [How many days](https://www.sailhalong.com/how-many-days-in-halong-bay/): Match route, usable bay time and number of nights.

## Weather and decision guides

- [Weather and best time](https://www.sailhalong.com/halong-bay-weather-best-time/): Seasonal planning based on sourced destination data.
- [December weather](https://www.sailhalong.com/halong-bay-weather-december/): December conditions and practical packing guidance.
- [Is Halong Bay worth visiting](https://www.sailhalong.com/is-halong-bay-worth-visiting/): The trade-offs and the travelers who should choose somewhere else.

## Editorial information

- [About and editorial method](https://www.sailhalong.com/about/): How the site researches, sources and limits its claims.
- [Privacy](https://www.sailhalong.com/privacy/): What the site collects, what it does not collect and how external links work.
- [All cruise guides](https://www.sailhalong.com/guides/)
- [Blog](https://www.sailhalong.com/blog/)
